§6The Pinnacle: Thermonuclear Bombs§f

§aConstruct a massive multi-block hydrogen bomb to unleash unmatched cosmic levels of destruction!§f

The §9Thermonuclear Bomb§f is a multi-block explosive array that vastly dwarfs standard fission devices. By focusing fusion reactions through heavy physical casings, you can vaporize entire landscapes and dictate the radioactive nature of the fallout.

§6Multiblock Construction Steps§f:
1. §bBase Bomb§f: Place any fission bomb (such as a Uranium-233 bomb) on the ground. A higher-tier base bomb directly amplifies the final thermonuclear yield!
2. §bColumns§f: Place a §6vertical column of exactly 3 Thermonuclear Cores§f directly above the base bomb. All three cores must be vertically aligned.
3. §bTamper Casing§f: Completely surround the 3-core column with a §bTamper Shell§f of blocks. Your choice of tamper material alters the blast behavior:
  - §bReflective Tamper§f (Inert blocks): Slightly increases overall explosion yield.
  - §bFissionable Tamper§f (Heavy blocks): Greatly amplifies the explosive yield.
  - §bSalting Tamper§f (Salting blocks): Converts explosive energy into extreme, long-term radioactive fallout.
4. §bDetonate§f: Link a §bNuclear Detonator§f and trigger the blast remotely.

§cCRITICAL RADIATION WARNING§f:
§cThermonuclear Cores are extremely radioactive§f, emitting active radiation equal to §c3× Plutonium-239 rads§f! Handle them with heavy §bHazmat§f radiation gear or carry them inside §bShielded Nuclear Pigs§f to prevent lethal biological decay.

§eTip§f: Craft a Nuclear Detonator to arm your most destructive creations — never approach a primed thermonuclear device by hand, as the blast radius far exceeds a chunk.
